name: Wendy's Co
summary: . Company Overview Wendys is primarily engaged in the business of operating, developing and franchising a system of distinctive quick-service restaurants serving high quality food. Wendys opened its first restaurant in Columbus, Ohio in 1969. Today, Wendys is the second largest quick-service restaurant company in the hamburger sandwich segment in the United States (the U.S.) based on traffic and dollar share, and the third largest globally with 7,397 restaurants in the U.S. and 38 foreign countr...
